deltas.releaseNoteText: A new `addCommentDraft` event fires when a user abandons a reply or edit composer without submitting (e.g., clicks outside, closes the sidebar, or navigates away). The event payload includes the unsent text, HTML, attachments, recordings, and the parent annotation. Only fires when the thread already has at least one committed comment — brand-new pin drafts do not trigger it.
deltas.targetSection: Comment Lifecycle Events — Pin Clicks, Add Events, Button Clicks
deltas.summary: Document the new addCommentDraft event (enum ADD_COMMENT_DRAFT) with its AddCommentDraftEvent payload, trigger conditions, and both React and non-React subscription patterns appended to events-comment-lifecycle.md

parameters.name: annotationId
parameters.description: ID of the comment annotation to which the abandoned draft belongs

parameters.name: commentAnnotation
parameters.description: The full comment annotation object (parent thread)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Snapshot of the unsaved composer content. In reply mode, contains pending text/HTML/attachments/recordings with from/createdAt set to current user/time. In edit mode, merges original comment fields with unsaved edits — commentId preserved.
